mapper.select: SELECT id, title, `image-url`, `link-url`, sort, status, remark, `create-time` FROM t_banner ORDER BY sort ASC
SELECT id, title, `image-url`, `link-url`, sort, status, remark, `create-time` FROM t_banner WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, title, `image-url`, `link-url`, sort, status, remark, `create-time` FROM t_banner WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY sort ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_banner (title, `image-url`, `link-url`, sort, status, remark, `create-time`) VALUES (#{title}, #{imageUrl}, #{linkUrl}, #{sort}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_banner SET title = #{title}, `image-url` = #{imageUrl}, `link-url` = #{linkUrl}, sort = #{sort}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark} WHERE id = #{id}
